message:
🔒 fix(agent): require validateToken on RBAC/HPA/PVC/quota handlers (#7980 #7982) (#8001)

Seven HTTP handlers in pkg/agent/server_http.go skipped validateToken,
leaving them reachable with any (or no) Authorization header:

  - handleHPAsHTTP
  - handlePVCsHTTP
  - handleRolesHTTP
  - handleRoleBindingsHTTP
  - handleResourceQuotasHTTP
  - handleLimitRangesHTTP
  - handleResolveDepsHTTP

Apply the same validateToken guard used by handleSecretsHTTP and the
other sensitive endpoints: short-circuit OPTIONS first, then return 401
Unauthorized if s.validateToken(r) fails, before any k8sClient work.

Fixes #7980 (HPAs/PVCs) and #7982 (Roles/RoleBindings). Note: #7982 also
references handleClusterRolesHTTP/handleClusterRoleBindingsHTTP, but
those handlers do not exist in this file; the ClusterRole[Binding] path
is served through a different route and is not affected.

ResourceQuotas, LimitRanges, and ResolveDeps were not named in either
issue but have the identical omission and are fixed in the same pass to
avoid leaving known-vulnerable handlers behind.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
